page_title: Pachinko Shin Evangelion Chōsoku Kōryaku SP
text:
is a guidebook for Pachinko Shin Evangelion pachinko machine by Tatsumi Mook Editorial Department. It was published by Tatsumi Publishing on 15 December 2023. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/477783106X 

Overview

It is a guidebook for Pachinko Shin Evangelion Type Rei amd Type Kaworu machines.
